content:
🔥 flutter-agent-panel | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enhancing AI pair-coding and developer workflow by unifying terminal emulation and AI agent management in a cross-platform desktop application.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-Workspace Management • Professional Terminal Emulator (xterm.dart, flutter_pty) • AI Agent Integration (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, etc.) • Modern UI/UX (shadcn_ui, dark/light mode)
📖 Summary: Flutter Agent Panel is a cross-platform desktop application that unifies a terminal emulator with AI agent management. It allows developers to organize their CLI tools and AI assistants within distinct workspaces, streamlining AI-powered pair-coding and command-line workflows.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
